title: Athletes with fungal infection: 11 herbal teas to the rescue
description: Origanum vulgare teas, also known as oregano tea, have been traditionally used to help combat fungal infections. This is due to the presence of compounds like carvacrol, thymol, and rosmarinic acid, which have antifungal properties. Carvacrol, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the growth of fungi by disrupting their cell membranes. Thymol, on the other hand, has been found to exhibit antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can also help in treating fungal infections.  If ...
